nasb.text: “But if the priest shall look, and indeed the mark has not spread in the garment, either in the warp or in the woof, or in any article of leather,

esv.text: “And if the priest examines, and if the disease has not spread in the garment, in the warp or the woof or in any article made of skin,

cnv.text: “但如果祭司察看病症，在衣服、編結物、紡織物，或是皮子做的任何物件上，沒有蔓延，

ccb.text: 如果祭司发现衣服、编织品或皮革上的霉斑没有蔓延，
